sections.paragraph:
μέτωπον, ου, τό (Hom.+) forehead Lk 23:48 D. Of a young woman: veiled ἕως τοῦ μ. Hv 4, 2, 1. As the place marked w. a sign of some kind (s. BStade, D. Kainszeichen: ZAW 14, 1894, 250ff; PsSol 15:9; Diphilus Com. [IV b.c.], Fgm. 66, 8 K.; Herodas 5, 79; Lucian, Pisc. 46; Porphyr., Vi. Pyth. 15; Liban., Or. 25, 21 vol. II p. 547, 1 F.; of a branded slave, Martial 3, 21) Rv 7:3; 9:4; 13:16; 14:1, 9; 17:5; 20:4; 22:4 (SIG 1168, 48 and 54 [letters]; PLille 29 II, 36; Ezk 9:4 al.).—B. 218. DELG 1 μ. M-M. TW.

Hom Hom , VIII b.c.—List 5

D D = Didache, except that in a list of manuscripts or as textual variant D refers to Codex Bezae—List 1

Hv Hv = Visions

ZAW ZAW = Zeitschrift für die Alttestamentliche Wissenschaft—Lists 6

PsSol PsSol = Psalms of Solomon—List 2

Diphilus Com. Diphilus Com. , IV–III b.c.—List 5

Fgm. Fgm. = fragment, fragmentary

Herodas Herodas , a.k.a. Herondas, III b.c.—List 5

Lucian Lucian , II a.d.—List 5

Vi. Vi. = Vita, Vitae

vol. vol. = volume

SIG SIG = Sylloge Inscriptionum Graecarum3; superscript omitted in text—List 3

PLille PLille = Papyrus grecs de Lille—List 4

  1. al. =alibi (elsewhere), aliter (otherwise), alii (others)
  2. B. = CDBuck, A Dictionary of Selected Synonyms—List 6

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

M-M M-M = JMoulton/GMilligan, Vocabulary of Greek Testament—Lists 4, 6

TW TW = Theologisches Wörterbuch zum NT; tr. GBromiley, Theological Dictionary of the NT—List 6

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 642
